title: neonauclea calycina
intro: Neonauclea calycina, also known as the mountain rose, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical forests of the Philippines. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin diseases. The health benefits of Neonauclea calycina include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, and prevent infections. The plant's leaves and roots can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to make infusions for medicinal purposes.
